underlying_goal: Implement a multi-repository smart contract system for Paimon RWA Launchpad with 4-layer pricing, conviction-weighted drops, PointsHub upgrade, and Soulbound Badge NFT
friction_detail: Test failures required fixes (prank/fuzz issues), and initial PRs lacked detail requiring user to request more detailed PRs.
brief_summary: User asked Claude to implement a complex multi-repo Solidity launchpad system with tests, git operations, and PRs; all was delivered after minor test fixes and PR detail improvements.
